Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer.name: Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer
Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer.text:
Whenever Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer deals combat damage to a player, create a Treasure token and exile the top card of that player's library. Until end of turn, you may cast that card.
Dash {1}{R}

Territorial Kavu.name: Territorial Kavu
Territorial Kavu.text:
Domain — Territorial Kavu's power and toughness are each equal to the number of basic land types among lands you control.
Vigilance
Whenever Territorial Kavu attacks, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

Scion of Draco.name: Scion of Draco
Scion of Draco.text:
Domain — This spell costs {2} less to cast for each basic land type among lands you control.
Flying
Each creature you control has vigilance if it's white, hexproof if it's blue, lifelink if it's black, first strike if it's red, and trample if it's green.

Orcish Bowmasters.text:
Flash
When Orcish Bowmasters enters the battlefield, and whenever an opponent draws a card except the first one they draw in each of their draw steps, amass Orcs 1 and Orcish Bowmasters deals 1 damage to any target.

Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury.name: Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury
Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury.text:
When this spell is cast and when Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury enters the battlefield, it deals 3 damage to any target and you gain 3 life.
Escape — {R}{R}{W}{W}, Exile five other cards from your graveyard.

Leyline Binding.name: Leyline Binding
Leyline Binding.text:
Domain — This spell costs {1} less to cast for each basic land type among lands you control.
Flash
When Leyline Binding enters the battlefield, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until Leyline Binding leaves the battlefield.

Tribal Flames.name: Tribal Flames
Tribal Flames.text: Domain — Tribal Flames deals X damage to any target, where X is the number of basic land types among lands you control.

Lightning Bolt.name: Lightning Bolt
Lightning Bolt.text: Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage to any target.

Stubborn Denial.name: Stubborn Denial
Stubborn Denial.text:
Counter target noncreature spell unless its controller pays {1}.
Ferocious — If you control a creature with power 4 or greater, counter that spell instead.

Omnath, Locus of Creation.name: Omnath, Locus of Creation
Omnath, Locus of Creation.text:
When Omnath, Locus of Creation enters the battlefield, draw a card.
Landfall — Whenever a land enters the battlefield under your control, you gain 4 life if this is the first time this ability has resolved this turn. If it's the second time, add {R}{G}{W}{U}. If it's the third time, Omnath deals 4 damage to each opponent and each planeswalker you don't control.

Solitude.name: Solitude
Solitude.text:
Flash
Lifelink
When Solitude enters the battlefield, exile up to one other target creature. That creature's controller gains life equal to its power.
Evoke—Exile a white card from your hand.

Endurance.name: Endurance
Endurance.text:
Flash
Reach
When Endurance enters the battlefield, up to one target player shuffles their graveyard into their library.
Evoke—Exile a green card from your hand.

Eternal Witness.name: Eternal Witness
Eternal Witness.text: When Eternal Witness enters the battlefield, you may return target card from your graveyard to your hand.

Quantum Riddler.name: Quantum Riddler
Quantum Riddler.text:
When Quantum Riddler enters the battlefield, draw two cards.
When Quantum Riddler dies, draw a card.

Ephemerate.name: Ephemerate
Ephemerate.text:
Exile target creature you control, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control.
Rebound

Prismatic Ending.name: Prismatic Ending
Prismatic Ending.text: Converge — Exile target nonland permanent if its mana value is less than or equal to the number of colors of mana spent to cast this spell.

Teferi, Time Raveler.name: Teferi, Time Raveler
Teferi, Time Raveler.text:
Each opponent can cast spells only any time they could cast a sorcery.
+1: Until your next turn, you may cast sorcery spells as though they had flash.
−3: Return up to one target artifact, creature, or enchantment to its owner's hand. Draw a card.

Wrenn and Six.name: Wrenn and Six
Wrenn and Six.text:
+1: Return up to one target land card from your graveyard to your hand.
−1: Wrenn and Six deals 1 damage to any target.
−7: You get an emblem with "Instant and sorcery cards in your graveyard have retrace."
